case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,320.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,320.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER TO LIFT STAY OF FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF NOTICE OF DEPOSITION OF HON. WILLIAM J. CAHILL (RET.), INCL. DEPO SUBPOENA & CASEY DECLARATION ISO CREATING NEW CASE NUMBER TO ISSUE DEPO SUBPOENA FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO STAY FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $580.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY ALEXANDRA RAHN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT GABRIELE STOPPINI. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,740.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
